name: SA Accounting Templates
description: Document templates for South African accounting firms: engagement letters, monthly reports, and compliance correspondence

templates.name: Engagement Letter — Monthly Bookkeeping
templates.description: Standard SAICA-format engagement letter for monthly bookkeeping services. Includes scope of work, monthly fee, and standard clauses.

templates.name: Engagement Letter — Annual Tax Return
templates.description: Engagement letter for annual income tax return preparation. References tax year and SARS submission deadline.

templates.name: Engagement Letter — Advisory
templates.description: Engagement letter for hourly advisory services. Specifies hourly rate and estimated hours.

templates.name: Monthly Report Cover
templates.description: Cover page for monthly bookkeeping deliverables package.

templates.name: SA Tax Invoice
templates.description: South African tax invoice template with VAT number, bank details, and SARS-compliant formatting.

templates.name: Statement of Account
templates.description: Client statement of account showing all invoices, payments, and outstanding balance.

templates.name: FICA Confirmation Letter
templates.description: Letter confirming FICA/KYC verification has been completed for a client.
